title: RCCE Social Investigation Form - Part B: Community Questionnaire

item.text: How many people live in this household?
Knowledge and Awareness on current disease outbreak in this community
Have you heard of the current disease outbreak in this area?
Would you explain what this disease is?
Do you know who is at risk of this disease?
What are some of the signs and symptoms of this disease?
How do you think this disease is transmitted? (Check all that apply)
Do you think this disease can be prevented?
